title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has published warnings about AI self-improvement, noting that Claude is increasingly involved in writing code, reviewing code, running experiments, and accelerating AI system development. OpenAI is warning about similar trends, with concerns that AI labs may be entering early stages of self-directed improvement where humans set goals but AI handles implementation.
